changeSet.author: admin

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE path = '/dev/runtime'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO sys_menu (name, type, permission, parent_id, sort, path, component, description, status, meta, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, deleted, id, component_name, icon, `show`) VALUES ('DevRuntime', 'menu', null, '369246783473266688', 2, '/dev/runtime', '/develop/runtime/list', null, '1', '{"title": "动态数据", "hideInMenu": true, "keepAlive": true}', 'admin', NOW(), 'admin', NOW(), 0, '369247187489599489', null, null, 0);
